name: Dividend Ledger
description: A dividend payment history ledger that records declaration dates, ex-dates, payment dates, per-share amounts, total payouts, and tax treatment classifications across an investor's entire dividend income timeline.

standard.description: Detailed row-by-row ledger showing declaration date, ex-date, pay date, amount per share, total amount, and tax treatment chip. Every dividend payment appears as a discrete row with alternating backgrounds for readability.

annual.description: Yearly-grouped summary with YearGroupHeader rows aggregating dividend income per calendar year plus per-year subtotals broken down by tax treatment category, ideal for tax-season preparation and annual reporting.

upcoming.description: Forward-looking view highlighting only scheduled and announced-but-unpaid dividends with ScheduledBadge indicators, sorted by pay date ascending, intended for cash-flow planning dashboards.

visual_brief: A dense financial ledger rendered inside a d-surface card. The table header spans the full width with d-annotation small-caps column labels: Declaration, Ex-Date, Pay Date, Per Share, Total, Tax Treatment. A thin border separates the header from data rows. DividendRows alternate between the default surface color and a subtle 2% primary-tinted background for zebra striping. Each row contains: three DateBadges in compact pill form (e.g., 'Dec 14, 2025' in mono-data small text with a calendar icon glyph), then an AmountCell showing per-share amount ($0.24) in mono-data tabular-nums figures, then the total amount paid (computed from shares held × per-share) in semibold mono-data, then a TaxTreatmentChip color-coded by category: Qualified=emerald, Ordinary=slate, Return-of-Capital=amber, Foreign=violet, Section199A=teal. Chips are pill-shaped with tiny icon prefixes. Rows are clickable and expand inline to reveal source security ticker, shares held at record date, withholding tax breakdown, and notes. A sticky TotalFooter at the bottom shows aggregate totals: total dividends received, total shares paid on, effective yield, and breakdown percentages per tax treatment. Annual preset inserts YearGroupHeader rows (full-width pill with year number in large semibold text, background matching surface-elevated) between year boundaries, with a subtotal row beneath each year showing annual dividend income grouped by tax category. Upcoming preset replaces the default row background with a subtle amber-tinted surface for scheduled dividends and adds a ScheduledBadge ('Scheduled' or 'Announced') in each row, with a days-until-pay countdown chip.

layout_hints.note: Dividend ledgers are tax-critical financial records. Use mono-data with tabular-nums for ALL monetary and date figures. Right-align amount columns, left-align dates. Never round or truncate monetary values.
layout_hints.date_badges: DateBadge uses d-annotation[data-date] in pill form with a subtle calendar glyph prefix. All three date types (declaration/ex/pay) use identical styling to keep the row balanced. Dates formatted as 'MMM D, YYYY'.
layout_hints.tax_treatment_colors: TaxTreatmentChip colors MUST be consistent across the application: Qualified=emerald, Ordinary=slate, ROC=amber, Foreign=violet, 199A=teal. Never use red/green alone (colorblind-safe — pair with icon prefix).
layout_hints.total_footer: TotalFooter uses sticky positioning with color-mix background. Shows aggregate total plus percentage breakdown by tax treatment. Essential for 1099-DIV preparation.
layout_hints.year_group: YearGroupHeader uses d-row[data-group-header] with a larger text size (text-lg) and elevated background. Annual subtotal rows sit immediately below the final dividend row of each year, before the next YearGroupHeader.

slots.table-header: Sticky column-label row showing Declaration, Ex-Date, Pay Date, Per Share, Total, and Tax Treatment labels in d-annotation small-caps. Underline border separates header from data rows during scroll.
slots.dividend-rows: Repeating slot — one DividendRow per dividend payment event. Each row contains three DateBadges (declaration/ex/pay), AmountCell for per-share amount, AmountCell for total dollars received, and TaxTreatmentChip. Rows are interactive and expand inline to show source security, shares held at record date, withholding tax, and notes.
slots.year-group-headers: Annual-preset-only slot. Full-width header rows grouping dividends by calendar year. Each header shows the year number and a right-aligned annual total. Subtotal row beneath each year breaks down by tax treatment category.
slots.scheduled-badges: Upcoming-preset-only slot. Each DividendRow includes a ScheduledBadge showing 'Announced', 'Scheduled', or 'Declared' status plus a countdown chip with days-until-pay. Rows tinted amber to distinguish from paid dividends.
slots.total-footer: Sticky footer aggregating total dividends received, total shares paid on, weighted-average yield, and breakdown percentages by tax treatment category. Uses bold mono-data figures.

keyboard: Enter: expand row for payment details
G: jump to next year group (annual preset)

responsive.mobile: Table reflows to a vertical card-stack. Each dividend becomes a card showing total amount and tax treatment chip prominently, with dates and per-share stacked beneath. TotalFooter remains sticky. YearGroupHeaders remain visible as section dividers.
responsive.tablet: Standard table with DateBadges condensed to show only pay-date; ex-date and declaration-date revealed on row expand.

micro.chip-glow: tax-chip subtle scale 1.03 on hover 120ms ease-out

ambient.upcoming-pulse: ScheduledBadge border glow 1.5s ease-in-out infinite on unpaid dividends

composition.DividendRow: Row(d-row, data-interactive) > [DeclarationBadge + ExDateBadge + PayDateBadge + AmountCell + TotalCell + TaxTreatmentChip + ScheduledBadge?]
